heatwave.Q1.helpGroup.text.1.en: This refers to the accommodation where you spend most of your summer, it can also be a holiday house.

heatwave.Q1.title.en: Do you live in rental accommodation?

heatwave.Q10.title.en: What was the highest temperature recorded inside your home over the past week?

heatwave.Q11.title.en: What was the lowest temperature recorded inside your home over the past week?

heatwave.Q12.helpGroup.text.1.en: We are asking this question to get the environmental temperature in the reported location.

heatwave.Q12.title.en: During daylight hours, which location did you spend the most time in this past week?

heatwave.Q13.title.en: How uncomfortable (e.g. intense sweat, exhaustion, etc.) were you because of the hot weather this past week during the day?

heatwave.Q14.helpGroup.text.1.en: We are asking this question to get the environmental temperature in the reported location.

heatwave.Q14.title.en: During night hours, which location did you spend the most time in this past week?

heatwave.Q15.title.en: How uncomfortable (intense sweat, exhaustion, etc.) were you because of the temperature this past week during the night?

heatwave.Q16.title.en: Did you experience any symptoms due to high/extreme heat this past week?

heatwave.Q16a.code.telephone.en: Yes, through a telephone or online health advice service

heatwave.Q16a.title.en: Did you seek health care to manage your symptoms?

heatwave.Q17.code.canceled.en: I canceled some activities (other than work) for the day

heatwave.Q17.code.changed_time.en: Changed the time when I go to work/everyday activities

heatwave.Q17.code.couldnt_concentrate.en: Went to work but couldn't concentrate

heatwave.Q17.code.went_to_ac.en: I didn't work from home as usual but went to the office/location with AC because of AC

heatwave.Q17.code.work_from_home.en: I had to work from home

heatwave.Q17.title.en: Did extreme heat alter your routine/quality of life this past week?

heatwave.Q17a.title.en: Were you absent from work/normal activities due to your symptoms this past week?

heatwave.Q18.code.another_room.en: Slept in another room (cooler) at my living place

heatwave.Q18.code.closed_shutters.en: Stayed inside and closed all window shutters and curtains

heatwave.Q18.code.cooler_in_town.en: Went to a cooler location in town (e.g. friend's house)

heatwave.Q18.code.cooler_out_town.en: Went to a cooler location out of town (e.g. mountain, lake, seaside)

heatwave.Q18.code.museum.en: Went to a museum or library with air conditioning

heatwave.Q18.code.supermarket.en: Went to a supermarket with air conditioning

heatwave.Q18.code.swim.en: Went for a swim (e.g. pool, river, lake, sea, etc.)

heatwave.Q18.title.en: What actions did you take this past week to protect yourself from heat?

heatwave.Q19.code.all_year.en: A public building open all year round (library, museum, etc.)

heatwave.Q19.code.heat.en: A public building open specifically because of the heat

heatwave.Q19.title.en: Have you accessed a climate shelter this past week?

heatwave.Q19a.code.mobility.en: I have mobility issues and cannot go

heatwave.Q19a.code.none_nearby.en: There are no climate shelters nearby

heatwave.Q19a.code.too_far.en: It is too far/hard to reach

heatwave.Q19a.title.en: What are the reasons for not accessing a shelter?

heatwave.Q2.code.semidetached.en: Semi-detached / row or terrace house / historic attached home

heatwave.Q2.helpGroup.text.1.en: This refers to the accommodation where you spend most of your summer, it can also be a holiday house.

heatwave.Q2.title.en: What best describes your current housing?

heatwave.Q20.code.no_but_usually.en: No, but I usually use them

heatwave.Q20.code.no_not_usually.en: No, I don't usually use them

heatwave.Q20.title.en: Did you use public transport this past week?

heatwave.Q20a.code.out_of_order.en: Yes but it was out of order

heatwave.Q21.code.damages.en: Damages at my or others' homes

heatwave.Q21.title.en: Did you or your area experience any disruption related to heat during the past week?

heatwave.Q3.title.en: How many hours (approximately) of direct sunlight does your house receive currently?

heatwave.Q4.title.en: Do you have air-conditioning in your current housing?

heatwave.Q5.title.en: How often do you use it on hot days (> 30 degrees)

heatwave.Q6.title.en: Do you have air-conditioning in your current workplace/school?

heatwave.Q7.title.en: In a typical summer week, approximately how many hours do you feel too hot while working, doing household activities or carrying out other daily activities (including at home)?

heatwave.Q8.title.en: In a typical summer week, approximately how many hours do you feel too hot while exercising, or doing other more intense/strenuous daily activities?

heatwave.Q9.title.en: Have you experienced any symptoms due to high/extreme heat during the summer of 2025 and first part of 2026?

heatwave.common.symptom.ataxia.en: Lack of coordination / difficulty with movement

heatwave.consent.Q1.text.en: Bla bla bla, Please read the [information sheet](https://influweb.org/privacy) for more information

heatwave.consent.Q1.title.en: Do you consent to take part in the heatwave surveys?

heatwave.consent.description.en: Consent to take part in the heatwave surveys

heatwave.symptoms.description.en: Weekly survey about heat exposure, symptoms and the actions you took because of the heat
